evidence: Recent kubelet events show liveness probe timeout for container 'api'
Liveness probe timeout was observed 3 time(s) within the last 15 minutes
Container 'api' has restartCount=3 with state=running after liveness timeout events
Kubelet emitted 2 liveness-driven restart signal(s) after timeout events

causes.message: Container 'api' has a liveness probe configured
The liveness probe is timing out before the container responds
Probe timeout is preventing the workload from becoming healthy or remaining stable

pod:payments-api-6f7b8d4db9-tw8vz: liveness probe timeout detected for a running container
container:api: Liveness probe failed: Get "http://10.244.1.12:8080/healthz": context deadline exceeded (Client.Timeout exceeded while awaiting headers)

likely_causes: Probe timeoutSeconds is too low for the application's real response time
The probe endpoint or exec command is waiting on a slow dependency or overloaded runtime path
Node, network, or application latency is causing the health check to miss the kubelet timeout budget
suggested_checks: Compare probe timeout timestamps with application and dependency latency
